meta.purpose: Source-check flags for Appendix PP related-investigation extraction after Batch 12 seeded F550 logic
meta.normalization_note: The source handoff could not parse potential-tags sections for the target F-tags. This file preserves those manual-check flags while normalizing known Rev. 232 page starts from data/appendix_pp_tag_pages.json.

appendix_pp_source_rows.title: Respect and Dignity
appendix_pp_source_rows.notes: This batch did not fully parse the F557 section of Appendix PP Rev. 232. A human reviewer should confirm whether a Potential Tags for Additional Investigation block exists under F557 and capture any cross-referenced tags directly from the PDF.

appendix_pp_source_rows.title: Self-Determination
appendix_pp_source_rows.notes: Appendix PP Rev. 232 includes F561 Self-Determination under resident rights, but this batch did not extract a Potential Tags for Additional Investigation section or explicit cross-reference list. Manual PDF review is needed to determine whether F561 links to other F-tags.

appendix_pp_source_rows.title: Privacy and Confidentiality
appendix_pp_source_rows.notes: F583 is referenced under F550's Potential Tags for Additional Investigation for lack of visual privacy during treatment or ADL care. This batch did not fully parse F583's own section to determine whether it contains its own related-tag list.

appendix_pp_source_rows.title: Freedom from Abuse, Neglect, and Exploitation
appendix_pp_source_rows.heading_exact: F600 - Freedom from Abuse, Neglect, and Exploitation - General
appendix_pp_source_rows.notes: Appendix PP groups F600 with related abuse/neglect tags, including misappropriation/exploitation, involuntary seclusion, and restraints, but this batch did not extract a dedicated Potential Tags for Additional Investigation block for F600.

appendix_pp_source_rows.title: Involuntary Seclusion
appendix_pp_source_rows.notes: F603 conceptually overlaps with abuse/neglect and restraint protections, but this batch did not parse a specific Potential Tags for Additional Investigation table or bullet list for F603. Human review is required before adding explicit related-investigation rows.

appendix_pp_source_rows.title: Chemical Restraints / Psychotropic Drugs
appendix_pp_source_rows.notes: F605 guidance is intertwined with broader abuse/neglect and restraint rules, but this batch could not locate a clearly labeled Potential Tags for Additional Investigation subsection for F605. Manual PDF review is required before adding cross-reference rules.

human_review_flags.issue: Potential Tags for Additional Investigation sections for F557, F561, F583, F600, F603, and F605 could not be reliably parsed from Appendix PP Rev. 232 in this batch.
human_review_flags.recommended_action: Open the live CMS Appendix PP Rev. 232 PDF in a PDF viewer and manually navigate to F557, F561, F583, F600, F603, and F605. For each tag, confirm whether a Potential Tags for Additional Investigation block or equivalent cross-reference guidance is present. If present, capture each related F-tag, the brief condition/fact pattern text, and the PDF page number using PDF page numbering.
